news.title: 美伊战火引爆全球危机
全球秩序正在“崩溃”，卡尼呼吁加澳联手
news.title0: Global order is 'breaking down', Carney tells Australian parliament
news.content: 加拿大总理卡尼在澳大利亚议会演讲，称战后全球架构因连续危机而崩溃，呼吁加澳作为“战略表亲”合作，共同塑造新规则。
news.content0: With the post-war "global architecture breaking down from consecutive crises" Australia and Canada should work together as "strategic cousins",  Mark Carney has told the Australian parliament.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美伊冲突消耗巨大，武器库存成关键因素
news.title0: How depleted weapons stockpiles could affect the Iran conflict
news.content: 分析指出，美伊双方武器消耗速度远超生产能力，伊朗导弹和无人机发射量已大幅下降，库存压力可能影响战局走向。
news.content0: US President Donald Trump claims his country has a "virtually unlimited supply" of key weapons. Iran's defence ministry says it has "the capacity to resist the enemy" for longer than the US had planned.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美参院未能通过限制特朗普对伊战争权决议
news.title0: US Senate vote fails to rein in Trump war powers on Iran
news.content: 美国参议院以53-47票否决了一项两党决议，该决议旨在限制特朗普总统在未经国会批准的情况下对伊朗发动战争。
news.content0: A bipartisan resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump's ability to wage war in Iran has failed in the US Senate, as the strikes continue.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 俄天然气船在地中海沉没，俄方指控乌克兰所为
news.title0: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks in Mediterranean
news.content: 一艘俄罗斯液化天然气运输船在地中海起火爆炸后沉没，俄方指控乌克兰使用海上无人艇发动了袭击。
news.content0: A Russian liquefied natural gas (LNG) tanker has sunk in the Mediterranean between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan port officials have said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 贸易法庭下令退还关税，特朗普政府遭遇挫折
news.title0: Trade court orders tariff refunds in setback for Trump administration
news.content: 美国国际贸易法院下令海关向数千家企业退还特朗普政府去年征收的关税，此前最高法院已裁定这些关税无效。
news.content0: A federal judge has cleared the way for thousands of businesses to receive refunds for tariffs that the Supreme Court struck down last month.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗袭击伊拉克北部库尔德武装总部
news.title0: Iran targets headquarters of Iranian Kurdish forces in Iraq
news.content: 伊朗军方称其袭击了伊拉克北部库尔德地区的伊朗库尔德反对派武装总部，造成人员伤亡，冲突有扩大风险。
news.content0: Iran's military has said it has targeted the headquarters of Iranian Kurdish forces in northern Iraq, stepping up strikes on Kurdish regions in both Iran and Iraq.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 古巴燃料危机加剧，数百万人遭遇大停电
news.title0: Millions of Cubans plunged into darkness as fuel crisis deepens
news.content: 古巴因燃料短缺加剧，一座主要发电厂意外关闭，导致全国三分之二地区停电，数百万人陷入黑暗。
news.content0: Millions of people were left without power in Cuba on Wednesday - the latest in a string of blackouts to hit the island as it struggles with fuel shortages worsened by pressure from the US.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 77岁心脏病幸存者欲骑摩托车环游世界创纪录
news.title0: He’s 77 and a heart attack survivor. Now he’s trying to ride a motorcycle around the world
news.content: 77岁的美国老人史蒂文·巴尼特，一位心脏病幸存者，计划骑摩托车穿越27个国家，试图创造最年长环游世界摩托车手纪录。
news.content0: He got his first motorcycle at 15, and Steven Barnett, originally from Los Angeles, has ridden across nearly 80 countries in the five decades since.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 研究：停用减肥针一年内体重或快速反弹
news.title0: Stopping weight loss jabs can lead to rapid weight regain in one year, study suggests
news.content: 剑桥大学研究显示，停止使用减肥注射药物后52周内，使用者平均会反弹掉所减体重的60%，若反弹主要为脂肪则情况更糟。
news.content0: People on obesity jabs will regain the majority of the weight they lose within a year of stopping the drugs, a new study suggests.
news.author: Sky News
